title: Vanilla Performance Client
description:
NVIDIA GPUs only!
Performance-enhancing client with Complementary Reimagined Shaders and my personal VanillaTweaks texture pack. 
Uses InvMove and JourneyMod, so beware when playing on servers that may have these mods banned.
body:
**NVIDIA GPUs only!**
**Uses NVidium.**

Only **client-side** mods to improve the overall performance of Minecraft. Includes my personal _VanillaTweaks_ Texture Pack and the _Complementary Unbound Shaders._

You can play on Vanilla or Non-Modded servers with this mod pack.
This mod pack is meant to be a clientside performance-enhancing mod pack while using mods to better the look and feel of Minecraft, especially through its GUI and HUD while keeping the appeal of Minecraft itself. 

**Performance:**
This mod pack uses commonly seen mods, such as Sodium, Sodium Extra, Lithium, BetterBeds, NVidium, and so on. Additionally, other mods, such as LazyDFU and LanguageReload, alongside others, help to bolster the background performance and loading times of Minecraft. Moreover, this mod pack includes Faster Loading and Ksyxis to further improve world loading and generation times. 

**GUI and HUD aesthetic:**
Here, mods such as AutoHUD, SmoothGUI, and Dark Loading Times, alongside others give a better UI experience as a whole. Some other mods are utilized as well, such as InvMove, Blur, and Advancement Plaque, with more, to give other aesthetic and quality-of-life changes. 

**Quality of Life:**
Crutch mods that improve the Minecraft experience, such as AuthMe, Better Mount HUD + Better Boat HUD, and Crafting Tweaks are used to improve on basic aspects of the game. Some less commonly seen mods used as well are Explosive Enhancement, Longer Chat History, OptiGUI, and a handful of other mods that help to bring a better appearance and function from the famous mod Optifine, making it easier for previous Optifine users to adapt to Fabric's beloved Sodium.

**Bugfixes:**
And alas, mods used here for those pesky errors and bugs are Debugify, Carpet, Not Enough Crashes, Title Fixer, Spark, and a smaller other count of mods that help to deal with the rather irritating Vanilla experience that comes from lacking these critical mods. 

Uses _InvMove_ and _JourneyMap_, so **_remember_** to read server rules on these mods.

Download Links Below:
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/shaders/complementary-unbound](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/shaders/complementary-unbound)
[https://vanillatweaks.net/](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
[https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/)
